tasks.title: Static content model types (Tradition, PracticeType, Practice, LearningPath, LearningModule, Lesson)
acceptance_criteria: All types are Codable + Identifiable where applicable
Compiles standalone with no SwiftData import
No reference to a Deity type anywhere

tasks.title: SwiftData @Model classes + ModelContainer schema
acceptance_criteria: Each class is @Model final class, matches frozen signatures exactly
ModelContainer initializes with full schema and no migration crash on first launch
Singleton rows (StreakRecord, UserProfile) are fetched-or-created idempotently

tasks.title: Bundled content JSON + ContentCatalog loader with versioned upsert
acceptance_criteria: Loader throws a typed error on malformed JSON instead of crashing
Upsert keyed by stable content id preserves existing LessonProgressRecord rows across a version bump
At least one Hindu and one Jain practice and learning path present

tasks.title: Catalog decode + version-bump upsert unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Test seeds v1 content, records progress, reseeds v2 content, asserts progress survives
Test covers malformed/missing-field JSON producing a thrown error, not a crash

tasks.title: Real MVP content authoring (audio + lesson text)
acceptance_criteria: No practice references a silent or placeholder-beep audio asset
At least one full learning path module has real lesson text for both traditions

tasks.title: Support/LoadState and Support/AppError shared types
acceptance_criteria: LoadState<T> matches frozen signature (idle/loading/loaded/failed)
AppError conforms to LocalizedError with user-facing messages for all four cases

tasks.title: StreakService implementing StreakServicing
acceptance_criteria: recordPractice is idempotent for same local calendar day
Freeze consumption and streak-reset edge cases are unit tested
No clock-tamper detection logic added (explicitly out of scope per project_plan)

tasks.title: ProgressService implementing ProgressServicing
acceptance_criteria: Lesson unlock keyed by lessonID only, never by tradition
Switching UserProfile.selectedTradition does not alter any LessonProgressRecord
Sequential unlock ordering is unit tested

tasks.title: AudioPlaybackService and NotificationScheduler
acceptance_criteria: Audio prep happens off-main
Notification permission denial surfaces as a thrown/typed error, not a silent no-op

tasks.title: SubscriptionManager implementing SubscriptionManaging
acceptance_criteria: Product ids are aartipath.premium.monthly and aartipath.premium.annual
restorePurchases correctly flips isSubscribed after a simulated reinstall in tests

tasks.title: StoreKit Configuration file + sandbox scheme wiring
acceptance_criteria: Scheme runs against the local StoreKit config in simulator without a live App Store connection
Both product ids resolve in a test purchase

tasks.title: HomeViewModel + HomeView
acceptance_criteria: Empty, loading, success, and error states all render distinct UI
Today's practice reflects selectedTradition

tasks.title: PracticeSessionViewModel + PracticeSessionView
acceptance_criteria: Completing a session calls StreakServicing.recordPractice exactly once
Playback failure surfaces AppError.audioUnavailable in the UI

tasks.title: LearningPathViewModel + LearningPathView + LessonView
acceptance_criteria: Locked lessons are visibly non-interactive
Completing a lesson visibly unlocks exactly the next one

tasks.title: ProfileViewModel + ProfileView + StreakView
acceptance_criteria: Reminder time update round-trips through NotificationScheduling
Subscription status displayed matches SubscriptionManaging.isSubscribed

tasks.title: OnboardingViewModel + OnboardingView
acceptance_criteria: completeOnboarding persists selectedTradition to UserProfile
Cannot proceed past onboarding without a tradition selected

tasks.title: PaywallViewModel + PaywallView
acceptance_criteria: Purchase and restore both drive isPurchasing state correctly
Purchase failure surfaces AppError.purchaseFailed, not a silent failure

tasks.title: Accessibility, empty/loading/error state pass, and privacy/README polish
acceptance_criteria: VoiceOver labels and Dynamic Type support present on every screen
Notification permission usage string present in Info.plist
This task only adds diffs to existing views, never restructures a screen's layout or state ownership

tasks.title: End-to-end release-gate verification
acceptance_criteria: Full smoke sequence executed and passes: install, onboarding, practice, streak, lesson unlock, paywall purchase, force-quit/relaunch persistence, notification-denied error state on a second fresh install
Any failure blocks calling the app done
